expectations.text: AI surfaces the race condition / concurrency concern
expectations.evidence: AI pushed back: 'That falls apart on retries, double-clicks, and undo.' Edge cases in final prompt address concurrency explicitly.

expectations.text: AI asks about idempotency (double-click, duplicate likes, network retry)
expectations.evidence: AI challenged the increment-counter approach and asked about idempotency. Final prompt edge_cases mandate idempotent resolution.

expectations.text: AI asks whether users can undo/unlike
expectations.evidence: AI directly asked: 'Are you willing to... let users unlike a post?' User confirmed unlike support.

expectations.text: AI pushes back on the 'it's simple' framing
expectations.evidence: AI: 'I'd push back on just increment a counter. That falls apart on retries, double-clicks, and undo.'

expectations.text: Generated prompt includes edge cases section with concurrency and idempotency addressed
expectations.evidence: final_prompt.md <edge_cases> covers double-click idempotency, concurrent requests, post-deleted scenario, and persistence failure.
